summary: Shrink (erode) a mask region by a physical pixel radius. Compatibility macro: normalizes to mask.to_sdf -> sdf.offset(distance_px = -radius_px) -> sdf.to_mask (hard edge).

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: The coverage or selection mask to transform.

params.name: radius_px
params.doc: The physical pixel radius to shrink the region by; >= 0.

params.name: threshold
params.doc: The contour threshold forwarded to mask.to_sdf (coverage >= threshold is inside); default 0.5.

perceptual.reason: mask.shrink is an exact macro over the EDT/SDF path verified by hash-identity with the hand-written expansion; there is no perceptual metric
